description: Each TAIDL/XLA primitive maps to one or more realizations. Each realization maps to an ordered IP flow, an optional compound action model, and a cost tag. Fused patterns override individual per-op mappings.
pipeline_stages: 5. Per-op realization selection (default unless condition selects alternative)
7. Optional compound action expansion for hardware-specific tiled schedules
8. Cost aggregation via cost_tag and action/event coefficients

realizations.condition: standard matmul; operands fit in SPAD

ip_flow.notes: DIM×DIM PE array; WS or OS dataflow

realizations.gemmini_rationale: config_ex + matmul.preload + matmul.compute; result in ACC.
Same execute path but config_ex transpose bits set; on-chip transposer feeds mesh.

realizations.condition: tile larger than DIM; compiler emits CISC

compound_action_model.description: Expand one symbolic GEMM/MAC op into Gemmini tiled CISC-style actions before energy aggregation.

first_class_actions.name: mesh_compute_tile
first_class_actions.notes: Useful 8x8 systolic compute tile pass. This is semantic MAC work, not the full PrimeTime mesh hierarchy.

first_class_actions.name: spad_dma_write_byte
first_class_actions.notes: mvin endpoint writes into SPAD banks. External DRAM/HBM array energy is excluded separately.

first_class_actions.name: spad_operand_read_byte
first_class_actions.notes: SPAD operand reads feeding the mesh.

first_class_actions.name: spad_preload_read_byte
first_class_actions.notes: SPAD reads used by preload/MAC schedules.

first_class_actions.name: acc_init_write_chunk
first_class_actions.notes: First K-pass writes into accumulator.

first_class_actions.name: acc_rmw_chunk
first_class_actions.notes: Accumulator read-modify-write for partial-sum accumulation.

first_class_actions.name: acc_final_read_chunk
first_class_actions.notes: Final accumulator read for mvout/store.

first_class_actions.name: dma_command
first_class_actions.notes: Load/store/preload controller command overhead. Current presentation graph models command/control energy with a separate linear command-count term.

first_class_actions.name: config_command
first_class_actions.notes: Gemmini config command/control-register activity.

first_class_actions.name: flush_command
first_class_actions.notes: Flush/TLB-control command activity.

active_overhead_hooks.name: spad_active_cycle
active_overhead_hooks.notes: Needed to match PrimeTime SPAD active-window/control/clocked dynamic, especially for ADD.

active_overhead_hooks.name: mesh_control_or_idle_cycle
active_overhead_hooks.notes: Needed because PrimeTime mesh hierarchy burns dynamic energy even when no useful MAC commands are issued.

compound_action_model.event_notes: For 64x64 on DIM=8, GEMM has 512 compute tile passes. The current v3 PT probe reloads operand tiles for every compute pass and writes 64 final output tiles.

realizations.gemmini_rationale: gemmini_loop_ws: FSM handles double-buffered tiling automatically.

realizations.condition: add is fused as D operand in OS matmul

ip_flow.notes: Folded into matmul.preload D operand; no separate IP

realizations.gemmini_rationale: No separate IP; add absorbed into matmul.preload D preload. Cost folded into dot.

compound_action_model.description: Expand elementwise ADD implemented through Gemmini accumulator read-modify-write behavior.

first_class_actions.name: acc_rmw_chunk
first_class_actions.notes: Elementwise ADD path implemented as accumulator read-modify-write.

first_class_actions.name: spad_operand_read_byte
first_class_actions.notes: SPAD operand reads feeding ACC accumulation semantics.

first_class_actions.name: acc_dma_read_chunk
first_class_actions.notes: Accumulator read endpoint for store/mvout traffic.

first_class_actions.name: acc_dma_write_chunk
first_class_actions.notes: Accumulator write endpoint for mvin/load traffic.

first_class_actions.name: execute_command
first_class_actions.notes: Execute-controller and command-queue activity for accumulator ADD.

first_class_actions.name: config_command
first_class_actions.notes: Configuration traffic needed by the ADD command stream.

first_class_actions.name: flush_command
first_class_actions.notes: Flush/TLB-control command activity.

active_overhead_hooks.name: spad_active_cycle
active_overhead_hooks.notes: ADD exposes why this is needed: byte movement is small, but PrimeTime SPAD hierarchy still has active/control dynamic.

active_overhead_hooks.name: acc_active_cycle
active_overhead_hooks.notes: Current ACT ACC uses the isolated ACC idle-envelope per active cycle plus data-toggle slopes.

realizations.gemmini_rationale: ACC write with accumulate bit set (bit 30 of acc address). Uses acc adder units.

realizations.condition: general elementwise add; no fusion matched
realizations.gemmini_rationale: Rocket core library loop over SPAD/ACC data.

realizations.condition: operand in ACC; same adder family as add
realizations.gemmini_rationale: Same acc adder units as add; negate + accumulate.
Rocket core library.
No dedicated ewise-mul lane on Gemmini; Rocket library. Do NOT map to systolic.
No divider in Gemmini datapath; Rocket.

realizations.condition: divide by constant power-of-2; fits acc scale-down

ip_flow.notes: Scale on acc read-down; constant-division path

realizations.gemmini_rationale: Absorb into acc read-down scaling (config_ex scale field). Cost near zero.

ip_flow.notes: config_ex ReLU comparator on acc read-out
Write clamped result (or pass through to store)

realizations.gemmini_rationale: config_ex activation bit = 1. Applied on acc read-out. No separate engine.

ip_flow.notes: Pooled output via mvout to DRAM

realizations.gemmini_rationale: config_mvout pool params + mvout comparators. Part of StoreController.
Rocket core library.
Rocket core library.

realizations.condition: no bitwise vector ISA on Gemmini
realizations.gemmini_rationale: Rocket core.
Experimental config_norm. Only for supported integer exp subset.
Rocket core library (or SFU if you add one to your profile).
Experimental config_norm.
Rocket core library.

realizations.condition: combiner is add-like; reduction over systolic-friendly dim

ip_flow.notes: Partial sums via mesh (identity matmul or vector pass)

realizations.gemmini_rationale: Multi-pass through systolic+ACC; partial sums accumulated in AccumulatorMem.
Rocket core library.

ip_flow.notes: Partial sums via mesh (identity matmul or vector pass)

realizations.gemmini_rationale: Multi-pass ACC partials; may need Rocket for tail/finalization.
Rocket core library.

realizations.condition: single consumer; immediately consumed; no materialization

ip_flow.notes: Address generation unit re-reads same location with stride 0

realizations.gemmini_rationale: Controller AGU / stride-based reuse. Cost = 0 data movement.

realizations.condition: result must physically exist as dense tensor
realizations.gemmini_rationale: DMA engine writes expanded tensor into SPAD/ACC. Cost = tensor bytes.

ip_flow.notes: Absorbed into fused pattern; consumer handles addressing

realizations.gemmini_rationale: No separate cost; fusion region owns the accounting.

realizations.condition: no physical relayout needed; compatible row-major strides
realizations.gemmini_rationale: Metadata only. Cost = 0.
DMA + relayout path. Cost = tensor bytes.
Metadata only. Cost = 0.
DMA copy. Cost = tensor bytes.

realizations.condition: quant path; scale during load (mvin scale fields)
realizations.gemmini_rationale: Scale applied by mvin hardware during DRAM→SPAD transfer.

realizations.condition: quant path; scale on acc read-down to inputType

ip_flow.notes: Read from ACC with scale config active

realizations.gemmini_rationale: Acc read-down scaling (config_ex scale field). accType→inputType.
Rocket core. True value conversion.

realizations.condition: transpose absorbed by following dot; config_ex transpose bits

ip_flow.notes: On-chip transposer; cost folded into consumer matmul

realizations.gemmini_rationale: On-chip transposer inside ExecuteController. No separate movement cost.
DMA-based relayout (or transposer + explicit stage). Cost = tensor bytes.

compound_action_model.description: Expand load/store/mvin/mvout copies into DMA plus SPAD/ACC endpoint actions.

first_class_actions.name: spad_dma_write_byte
first_class_actions.notes: Endpoint write into SPAD for mvin/load.

first_class_actions.name: spad_dma_read_byte
first_class_actions.notes: Endpoint read from SPAD for mvout/store.

first_class_actions.name: acc_dma_write_chunk
first_class_actions.notes: Endpoint write into ACC for mvin/load.

first_class_actions.name: acc_dma_read_chunk
first_class_actions.notes: Endpoint read from ACC for mvout/store.

first_class_actions.name: dma_command
first_class_actions.notes: Load/store controller command overhead. External memory array energy remains excluded.

realizations.gemmini_rationale: mvin / mvout via LoadController / StoreController.
Internal datapath (like mov/mov_rev in ATTN_TILE64). Cost = on-chip bytes.

realizations.condition: submatrix via mvin/mvout row/col counts + strides
realizations.gemmini_rationale: Addressing only; no separate slice engine.

realizations.condition: sliced result must be standalone dense tensor

ip_flow.notes: Write dense slice to new SPAD region

realizations.gemmini_rationale: DMA copy to new SPAD region. Cost = slice bytes.

realizations.condition: stage operands into adjacent SPAD/ACC regions
realizations.gemmini_rationale: Sequential mvins. Cost = total bytes of all operands.
No gather/scatter on standard Gemmini; Rocket scalar loops.
DRAM → mvin into SPAD or ACC.
DRAM → mvin into SPAD or ACC.
Expands to compare+select; Rocket core.

realizations.condition: pattern recognized as max(x;0) after expansion

ip_flow.notes: Same as relu_activation; folded after select expansion

realizations.gemmini_rationale: Folds into config_ex ReLU.
Expands to compare+and+select; Rocket core.

fused_patterns.name: softmax_fused
fused_patterns.notes: Full softmax fused on config_norm or dedicated softmax IP. broadcast becomes internal address reuse.

fused_patterns.name: exp_reduce_fused
fused_patterns.notes: Partial fusion: exp+reduce fused, broadcast and divide remain separate.

fused_patterns.name: matmul_bias_relu
fused_patterns.notes: dot + bias add (D preload) + ReLU (config_ex activation) all in one execute pass.

fused_patterns.name: matmul_bias
fused_patterns.notes: dot + bias add via D preload.

fused_patterns.name: conv_ws_fused
fused_patterns.notes: gemmini_loop_conv_ws: convolution realized as im2col + systolic matmul.

systolic_mesh.notes: DIM×DIM PE array; WS or OS dataflow

activation_unit.notes: config_ex ReLU comparator on acc read-out

controller_agu.notes: Address generation unit re-reads same location with stride 0

tensor_compute_tiled.description: Multi-pass tiling includes DMA load/store overlap

zero_cost.description: Absorbed into dot; no incremental cost
